raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The artifact describes a multi-step bioinformatics pipeline (alignment → quantification → differential expression → prompt construction); logical coherence and methodological soundness of the described procedure are naturally in scope for a methods-section review, and the section contains at least one potentially contestable design choice (Cufflinks/Cuffdiff are legacy tools largely superseded by kallisto/DESeq2).","R1.6":"Writing polish is the most generic interpretation of 'help me with this section'—prose clarity, technical register, and paragraph-level flow are directly actionable, making this dimension load-bearing under that reading.","R1.7":"The section carries seven inline citations (Kim et al. 2013, Langmead and Salzberg 2012, Trapnell et al. 2012, GOA October 2024, etc.); verifying their accuracy, completeness, and correct attribution would be load-bearing if scholarly review is the intent."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you primarily asking for writing-quality improvements (prose clarity, flow, sentence-level edits), or for a technical/methodological critique (pipeline correctness, citation accuracy, logical soundness of the experimental design)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact describes a multi-step bioinformatics pipeline (alignment → quantification → differential expression → prompt construction); logical coherence and methodological soundness of the described procedure are naturally in scope for a methods-section review, and the section contains at least one potentially contestable design choice (Cufflinks/Cuffdiff are legacy tools largely superseded by kallisto/DESeq2).
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is the most generic interpretation of 'help me with this section'—prose clarity, technical register, and paragraph-level flow are directly actionable, making this dimension load-bearing under that reading.
rationale.R1.7: The section carries seven inline citations (Kim et al. 2013, Langmead and Salzberg 2012, Trapnell et al. 2012, GOA October 2024, etc.); verifying their accuracy, completeness, and correct attribution would be load-bearing if scholarly review is the intent.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you primarily asking for writing-quality improvements (prose clarity, flow, sentence-level edits), or for a technical/methodological critique (pipeline correctness, citation accuracy, logical soundness of the experimental design)?
